title: SecurityCraft: More Protectables
description: A SecurityCraft addon for better inter-mod compatibility among other things.
body:
More Protectables aims to provide much needed integration between [SecurityCraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/security-craft) and passcode protectable blocks from other mods such as:

- [Iron Chest](https://modrinth.com/mod/iron-chests)
- [Applied Energistics 2](https://modrinth.com/mod/ae2)
- [Tropicraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/tropicraft)
- [Twilight Forest](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-twilight-forest)

Additionally, this mod reworks some existing SecurityCraft blocks, mostly visually.

Suggestions for mod support are very welcome!

![Iron Chest Integration](https://i.imgur.com/6sgXvxB.gif)
